days.saints_uk: Неділя 23-тя по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 6. Єв. 1.; + Священномученика Теодора Ромжі, єпископа Мукачівського; 🕃 Свв. чудотворців і безсрібників Косми й Дам'яна.
days.saints_en: 22nd Sunday after Pentecost. Hieromartyr Theodore Romzha, Bishop of Mukachevo. Sts. Unmercenaries and Wonderworkers Cosmas & Damian
days.troparion_en: Holy unmercenaries and wonderworkers, Cosmas and Damian, / heal our infirmities. / Freely you have received; freely you give to us.

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 24-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Свв. мучеників Акиндина, Пигасія, Афтонія, Єлпидифора й Анемподиста.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Acindynus, Pegasius, Aphthonius, Elpidephorus & Anempodistus
days.troparion_en: Blessed is the earth that received your blood, Passion-bearers of the Lord, / and holy is the dwelling place which received your spirits. / You triumphed over the enemy in the stadium / and you preach

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Акепсими, єпископа, Йосифа, пресвітера, і Аїтала, диякона.; Оновлення храму Святого великомученика Юрія, що в Лідді, де спочиває його чесне тіло.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Acepsimas the Bishop, Joseph the Presbyter & Aithala the Deacon. Dedication of the Church of St. Great Martyr George at Lydda, where his precious body rests
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless bo

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Йоанікія Великого; Св. мученика Нікандра, єпископа Мирського; Св. Єрмея, пресвітера.
days.saints_en: Ven. Joannicius the Great. St. Martyr Nicander, Bishop of Myra. St. Hermeas the Presbyter
days.troparion_en: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Joann

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Галактіона і Єпістими.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Galaction & Episteme
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless b

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Св. Павла, архиєпископа Царгородського, ісповідника.
days.saints_en: St. Paul, Archbishop of Constantinople, Confessor
days.troparion_en:
(Original Melody) 
Your confession of the Divine Faith, /  has shown you to the Church as another Paul, and a zealot among priests;  / the righteous blood of Abel and Zachariah1 cries out to the Lord

days.saints_uk: Свв. тридцяти трьох мучеників, що в Мелітині; Преподобного отця нашого і чудотворця Лазаря, що постив на Галисійській горі.
days.saints_en: Sts. Thirty-Three Martyrs of Melitene. Ven. Wonderworker Lazarus, Who Fasted on Mount Galesion
days.troparion_en: Your thirty-three holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered th

days.saints_uk: Неділя 24-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 7. Єв. 2.; 🕁 Собор св. архистратига Михаїла та інших безтілесних сил.
days.saints_en: 23rd Sunday after Pentecost. Synaxis of the Holy Archangel Michael and the Other Bodiless Powers
days.troparion_en: Commanders of the heavenly hosts, / we who are unworthy beseech you, / by your prayers encompass us beneath the wings of your immaterial glory, / and faithfully preserve us who fall down and cry to yo

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 25-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Свв. мучеників Онисифора й Порфирія; Преподобної матері нашої Матрони; Преподобної Теоктисти, що з Лезви.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Onesiphorus & Porphyrius. Ven. Matrona. Ven. Theoktiste of Lesbos
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs, Onesiphorus and Porphyrius, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / a

days.saints_uk: Свв. апостолів Ераста, Олімпа, Родіона і тих, що з ними.
days.saints_en: Sts. Apostles Erastus, Olympas, Rhodion, and those with them
days.troparion_en: Holy Apostles, Erastus, Olympas, Herodion, Sosipater, Quartus and Tertius, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Мини, Віктора й Вінкентія; Святої мучениці Стефаніди; Преподобного отця нашого й ісповідника Теодора Студійського
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Menas, Victor & Vincent. St. Martyr Stephanida. Ven. Confessor Theodore the Studite
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)
Forsaking an earthly army, O prize-winner, /  you received a heavenly inheritance, after receiving glory from earthly kings,  / O wise one, you endured martyrdo

days.saints_uk: 🕁 Св. священномученика Йосафата, архиєпископа Полоцького; 🕃 Св. отця нашого Івана Милостивого, патріарха Олександрійського; Преподобного отця нашого Ніла; Блаженного священномученика Григорія Лакоти, єпископа
days.saints_en: Hieromartyr Josaphat, Archbishop of Polotsk. St. John the Merciful, Patriarch of Alexandria. Ven. Nilus. Blessed Hieromartyr Gregory Lakota, Bishop
days.troparion_en: By endurance you gained your reward, venerable Father; / you persevered in prayer unceasingly; / you loved the poor and provided for them in all things. / Blessed John the Merciful, intercede with Chr

days.saints_uk: + Св. отця нашого Івана Золотоустого, архиєпископа Царгородського
days.saints_en: St. John Chrysostom, Archbishop of Constantinople
days.troparion_en: Grace shining forth from your mouth like a beacon has illumined the inhabited earth; /  it has disclosed to the world treasures which wealth cannot buy;  / and has set forth for us the height of humil

days.saints_uk: + Св. і всехвального апостола Филипа
days.saints_en: St. and All-Praised Apostle Philip
days.troparion_en: In you the image was preserved with exactness, O Father,  / for taking up your cross, you followed after Christ.  / By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away,  / but to car

days.saints_uk: Неділя 25-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 8. Єв. 3.; Початок Різдвяного посту.; Свв. мучеників та ісповідників Гурія, Самона й Авіва
days.saints_en: 24th Sunday after Pentecost. Sts. Martyrs and Confessors Gurias, Samonas & Abibus. Beginning of the Nativity Fast
days.troparion_en: Christ our God, You have granted us the miracles of Your holy martyrs / Gurias, Samonas and Abibas, / as a stronghold and protection. / Through their prayers, strengthen those in authority in every go

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 26-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; + Св. апостола і євангелиста Матея
days.saints_en: St. Apostle and Evangelist Matthew
days.troparion_en: With zeal, you followed Christ the Master, / who in His goodness, appeared on earth to mankind. / Summoning you from the custom house, / He revealed you as a chosen apostle: / the proclaimer of the Go

days.saints_uk: Св. отця нашого Григорія, єпископа Неокесарійського, чудотворця.
days.saints_en: St. Gregory, Bishop of Neocaesarea, Wonderworker. Blessed Hieromartyr Josaphat Kotsylovsky, Bishop of Peremyshl
days.troparion_en: You became worthy of your name through your way of life: / through your vigilance in prayer and your constant works of mercy. / Therefore, O Father Gregory, beseech Christ God to enlighten our minds,

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Платона й Романа.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Plato & Romanus
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs Platon and Romanus, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shatte

days.saints_uk: Св. пророка Авдія; Св. мученика Варлаама.
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Obadiah. St. Martyr Barlaam
days.troparion_en: Armed with youthful fervor, / you endured martyrdom in old age and glorified Christ. / You offered Him your right hand as a whole burnt offering / and your holy soul as a blameless sacrifice. / Interc

days.saints_uk: + Преподобної матері нашої Йосафати Гордашевської; Передсвяття Введення у храм Пресвятої Богородиці; Преподобного Григорія Декаполіта; Св. отця нашого Прокла, архиєпископа Царгородського; Блаженного священномученика Йосафата Коциловського, єпископа; Перемишльського.
days.saints_en: Ven. Josaphata Hordashevska. Forefeast of the Entry of the Most Holy Theotokos into the Temple. Ven. Gregory of Decapolis. St. Proclus, Archbishop of Constantinople
days.troparion_en: (Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)Today Anna bequeaths gladness to all instead of sorrow by bringing forth her fruit,1 the only ever-Virgin. /  Today, in fulfillment of her vow,  / joyfully she br

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Введення у храм Пресвятої Владичиці нашої Богородиці і Приснодіви Марії
days.saints_en: Entry into the Temple of our Most Holy Lady, the Theotokos and Ever-Virgin Mary
days.troparion_en: Today is the prelude of the good will of God, / of the preaching of the salvation of mankind. / The Virgin appears in the temple of God, / in anticipation proclaiming Christ to all. / Let us rejoice /

days.saints_uk: Неділя 26-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 1. Єв. 4.; Св. апостола Филимона і тих, що з ним.
days.saints_en: 25th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Apostle Philemon and those with him
days.troparion_en: Holy Apostles Philemon, Archippus, Apphia, and Onesimus, / entreat the merciful God / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 27-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Свв. отців наших Амфілохія, єпископа Іконійського, і Григорія, єпископа Акрагантійського
days.saints_en: Sts. Amphilochius, Bishop of Iconium, & Gregory, Bishop of Agrigentum
days.troparion_en: Today is the prelude of the good will of God, / of the preaching of the salvation of mankind. / The Virgin appears in the temple of God, / in anticipation proclaiming Christ to all. / Let us rejoice /

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Святої великомучениці Катерини; Св. великомученика Меркурія
days.saints_en: St. Great Martyr Catherine. St. Great Martyr Mercurius
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “Come, let us worship the Word...”)
Let us hymn the godly Katherine, the all-praised Bride of Christ,  / the guardian of Sinai, our helper and defender,  / for brilliantly has she muzzled t

days.saints_uk: Віддання Введення у храм Пресвятої Богородиці.; Свв. отців наших і священномучеників Климента, папи Римського, і Петра, єпископа Олександрійського
days.saints_en: Hieromartyrs Clement, Pope of Rome, & Peter, Bishop of Alexandria. Leave-taking of the Entry of the Most Holy Theotokos into the Temple
days.troparion_en: O God of our Fathers, / always act with kindness towards us; / take not Your mercy from us, / but guide our lives in peace / through the prayers of the hierarchs Clement and Peter.

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Аліпія Стовпника; Пам'ять посвячення храму Святого великомученика Юрія, що в Києві перед воротами Святої Софії
days.saints_en: Ven. Alypius the Stylite. Commemoration of the Consecration of the Church of St. Great Martyr George in Kyiv before the Gates of Holy Sophia
days.troparion_en: You were a pillar of patient endurance, / having imitated the forefathers, O Venerable One: / Job in suffering, and Joseph in temptations. / You lived like the Bodiless Ones while yet in the flesh, O

days.saints_uk: Св. великомученика Якова Перського; Преподобного отця нашого Палладія
days.saints_en: St. Great Martyr James the Persian. Ven. Palladius
days.troparion_en: You astounded all, long-suffering James, by enduring horrible tortures with great patience. / As the evil assembly performed the slaughter, / you uttered prayers of thanksgiving to the Lord. / Through

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Преподобномученика Стефана Нового; Св. мученика Іринарха.
days.saints_en: Venerable Martyr Stephen the New. St. Martyr Irenarchus
days.troparion_en: Trained in asceticism on the mountain, / with the weapon of the Cross you destroyed the spiritual assaults of the hostile powers, all-blessed one; / Again you bravely prepared for combat / and slew Co

days.saints_uk: Неділя 27-ма по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 2. Єв. 5.; Св. мученика Парамона; Св. мученика Філумена; Преподобного Акакія, що згадується в «Ліствиці».
days.saints_en: 26th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Martyr Paramon. St. Martyr Philumenus. Ven. Acacius, mentioned in the Ladder
days.troparion_en: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Acaci

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 28-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; + Св. всехвального апостола Андрія Первозваного.
days.saints_en: St. All-Praised Apostle Andrew the First-Called
days.troparion_en: O Andrew, as the First-called of the Apostles  / and brother of their Leader,  /  entreat the Master of all  / to grant peace to the world  /  and to our souls great mercy.
